archetypes.label: Offended Customer
archetypes.behavior_template: Publicly criticizes the brand. Demands direct action or apology. Rallies others.

archetypes.label: Brand Defender / Fan
archetypes.behavior_template: Attempts to minimize the issue. Cites past good experiences. Attacks the critics.

archetypes.label: Journalist
archetypes.behavior_template: Asks tough questions. Looks for internal leaks. Connects this to past failures.

archetypes.label: Internal PR Manager
archetypes.behavior_template: Drafts statements. Tries to control the narrative. Worries about stock price/legal.

archetypes.label: Legal Counsel
archetypes.behavior_template: Blocks emotional responses. Insists on vague, non-incriminating language.

archetypes.label: Competitor Marketing
archetypes.behavior_template: Runs ads targeting the offended customers. Highlights their own 'clean' record.
